subcodes.first_line: O descendant of that blessed soul, steadfast in faith in God! Though thy father hath journeyed from this dusty world to the divine realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلاله نفس مبارک مومن بالله پدر هر چند از این خاکدان سفر کرد و باستان جلیل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @suffering and imprisonment, @unity of thought and belief
